{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204201069D663F812C077B7D040"}"},"total":8002},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7068457402899383072","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书还是不错的洪荒小说，虽说作者写作水平一般，没有什么太精彩的高潮迭起环节，对细节刻画像人物、环境、战斗场面等方面的处理略显粗糙，但是作者还是很用心的，也没有挑战我对洪荒的各种认知，符合印象中的人物关系和正常人的逻辑思维模式，而且看着不憋气，不孽情、不滥情。看着挺舒服的，就是系统弱了一些，其他的还好，如果是书荒或者是喜欢洪荒类题材的朋友，我觉得还是可以看看的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1645753492,"group_id":"7039351425041697830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看小说三十多年来从来没有写过小说，遇到这个机会突然就想试试。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4DcMeMB+cN13ZFhc1FP3vOmD+UwFgI4HyoKWJp7kyKK","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a795ec32278c496bb24b101f00bd6b43~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707108&x-signature=Q%2BdNyT1l%2FEqJSIuGelJO9RMmPgs%3D","user_id":"4064246307764059","user_name":"什么都爱看的老书虫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4064246307764059","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1759135790,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":24,"name":"气氛达人","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/b7c8672db629fbb3d8f83a83721675dc~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/d2c24adfe48394cad03d7b1d29d70622~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7039351425041697830","book_info":{"abstract":"开局选择成为第三只金乌，帝俊、太一的兄弟。
熟知剧情的他，怎能眼睁睁看着巫妖量劫的惨剧发生？
这一世，苟在太阳星打死不出，做一只稳健金乌。
直到有一天，巫族占领了整个洪荒，开始攻打太阳星。
凌霄从太阳星走出，巫族的至暗时刻降临！
一直到很久以后，仅存的巫族都忘不了那一天，被凌霄支配的恐惧。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0c04634fadb92f2248c531d5e088d967","author":"虎头蛇尾","author_id":"","book_id":"7039351425041697830","book_name":"洪荒：稳健金乌，妖族跪求我出山","book_short_name":"洪荒金乌道","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7043964951420994061","read_count":"59256","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1770073"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"871","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/22ac527f803b1778e5a7fc925790afa6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779308411&x-signature=lqtwQISuJeDdla4L6tYQQbB5n2s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3289329272097487","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.5654646e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032204201069D663F812C077B7D040"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9039,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24693,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":16043},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7053816124072985348","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"小说很不错，剧情丰富，也不啰嗦，虽然是选择系统，也属于苟分流，但是不像别的洪荒小说一直苟到大结局，题材也很新颖，可以封神这书，和《妖族帝子》《长生宫》《套娃老祖》并称洪荒四圣。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1642344552,"group_id":"7039351425041697830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不是什么书都能上我的书架，我的书架只有精品。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxNkmfhf+rUzR8huuhkvrsAoFeoDoTxDigVjEOQokjNP","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e53e9468d5184bd69766ae2c3d2af312~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708852&x-signature=Uf7rA90ChnDmnFU1quBdzUvRhys%3D","user_id":"3729171531442878","user_name":"龙宫寺坚（Darken）"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3729171531442878","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7039351425041697830","book_info":{"abstract":"开局选择成为第三只金乌，帝俊、太一的兄弟。

这一世，苟在太阳星打死不出，做一只稳健金乌。

d_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13992,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":108916},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7054886940503655168","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不得不说一句，作者写的这本小说非常和我的胃口。主角稳重且不嚣张跋扈，必要的狂傲该有的时候就有，且对待两个兄长也是以礼敬之，兄弟间和睦无间。这样的作品难道只有9.2吗？我觉得应该可以更高，在这里五星好评双手奉上。同时我希望作者大大可以更好地提供优质作品的同时可以保重身体。作为你书迷的一份子，只要这本书和之前一样好或者比以前更好，我就会不断追下去的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1642593872,"group_id":"7039351425041697830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3oo9hQC9ortbuJyt26qLaKXQ4CNDEq9ialdPof/nNr/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702960&x-signature=tRnwf4v8J2ikrGzX%2B9K6cLn0GrM%3D","user_id":"1213486753396398","user_name":"爱吃枸杞籽油的苏大人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1213486753396398","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7039351425041697830","book_info":{"abstract":"开局选择成为第三只金乌，帝俊、太一的兄弟。
